isolation.boundary: test_task_pipeline.py and CLI tasks generate subcommand

assertions.title: End-to-end task generation pipeline runs from source repo to task dataset

steps.action: Run full test suite: uv run pytest tests/test_task_pipeline.py -v
steps.expected: All pipeline tests pass including end-to-end dataset generation
steps.observed: 37 passed, 4 failed. Failures all caused by missing tree-sitter-language-pack optional dependency. The mutation pipeline falls back gracefully (logs WARNING, does not crash) but produces 0 mutations, resulting in empty datasets.

steps.action: Verify CLI subcommand: uv run grist-mill tasks generate --help
steps.expected: CLI subcommand exists and shows usage with required --repo option
steps.observed: CLI subcommand works correctly. Shows full help with options: --repo (required), --output, --max-mutations-per-type, --max-tasks-per-file, --timeout, --no-difficulty, --quiet.
FAILED: Dataset task_count == 0 because tree-sitter-language-pack is not installed, so AST parsing for mutations fails silently.

evidence.summary: 4 tests failed (test_pipeline_on_python_repo, test_pipeline_on_multi_language_repo, test_pipeline_registers_tasks_in_artifact_registry, test_pipeline_produces_dataset_automatically). All 4 share the same root cause: tree-sitter-language-pack optional dependency is not installed. Warning logged: 'tree-sitter-language-pack is required for AST parsing. Install it with: uv pip install tree-sitter-language-pack'. Pipeline does not crash — it recovers gracefully per VAL-SYNTH-06 — but produces 0 tasks.

assertions.issues: Missing optional dependency tree-sitter-language-pack prevents the mutation pipeline from generating tasks. The pipeline code handles this gracefully (logs a warning, skips the file) per VAL-SYNTH-06, but the end-to-end assertion requires a non-empty dataset which cannot be produced without the AST parsing capability.

steps.action: Run language-specific tests: uv run pytest tests/test_task_pipeline.py -v -k "TestMultiLanguageTaskDeclaration"

steps.expected: Task model accepts and stores language field correctly
steps.observed: PASSED: Task created with language='python', assertion task.language == 'python' succeeds

steps.expected: Task model accepts and stores dependencies list
steps.observed: PASSED: Task with dependencies=['numpy', 'pandas'] stores both correctly

steps.expected: Task test_command and setup_command define execution environment
steps.observed: PASSED: test_command='pytest tests/ -v' and setup_command='pip install -r requirements.txt' both stored correctly

evidence.summary: All 3 multi-language task declaration tests pass. Tasks correctly declare language, dependencies, and environment requirements (test_command, setup_command). The Task schema properly supports multi-language task declarations.

blockers.description: tree-sitter-language-pack optional dependency not installed in the environment. This prevents the mutation pipeline from generating any tasks, causing 4 test failures in VAL-SYNTH-05 (test_pipeline_on_python_repo, test_pipeline_on_multi_language_repo, test_pipeline_registers_tasks_in_artifact_registry, test_pipeline_produces_dataset_automatically). The pipeline handles this gracefully per VAL-SYNTH-06 (logs warning, skips mutation) but cannot produce a non-empty dataset without it.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Did not install the dependency as it is outside isolation boundary. Install command suggested by the pipeline: uv pip install tree-sitter-language-pack

summary: Tested 2 assertions: VAL-TASKFMT-01 passed (3/3 tests, tasks correctly declare language, dependencies, and environment requirements), VAL-SYNTH-05 failed (4/4 end-to-end tests failed due to missing tree-sitter-language-pack optional dependency). CLI subcommand 'grist-mill tasks generate --help' works correctly. The pipeline code itself is correct and handles the missing dependency gracefully, but cannot produce tasks without AST parsing capability.
